title: SIBLING CAMP - 211info
text: KINDRED MATTERS SIBLING CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A week-long residential camp providing separated siblings the opportunity to build positive memories through activities like campfires, swimming, and shared celebrations Eligibility: Separated siblings aged 8–18 living apart due to foster care, adoption, or other circumstances Hours: Varies (458) 888-9356 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (458) 888-9356 Main phone Main phone (458) 888-9356 Elizabeth Parker [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: To enroll a child in ODHS custody, please contact their caseworker or email to complete an application, which should be submitted by the adult who knows the young person best FEES: For information on subsidized fees and potential scholarships, contact the child’s caseworker or reach out via email or phone DOCUMENTS: Completed application form AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - FAMILY CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - KINNECT EVENTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KINDRED MATTERS
